# Oscar OLG Photography — Lead Nurturing Templates & Ready-to-Send Messages
## Copy-Paste WhatsApp, Email & Call Templates

**Last Updated:** April 2, 2026  
**Usage:** Open this doc during calls / follow-ups and copy messages directly  

---

## 📱 WHATSAPP MESSAGE TEMPLATES

### ✅ READY TO COPY & SEND

---

## MSG 1: Welcome + Application Confirmation (Send immediately after form)

```
¡Felicidades por tu compromiso! 🎉

Hola [FIRST_NAME]!

Qué emoción que estén iniciando esta aventura juntos.

Recibimos tu aplicación para nuestra sesión de compromiso sin costo, 
y tu historia nos encantó 😍

Aquí está el plan:

1️⃣ Revisamos tu aplicación
2️⃣ Si conectamos, te invito a una llamada corta (15 minutos)
3️⃣ Platicamos opciones + próximos pasos

¿Cuándo te vendría bien una breve llamada esta semana?

Aquí van algunos horarios donde tengo espacio:
[CALENDAR_LINK]

¡Ansía de conocerte a ti y a [PARTNER_NAME]!

Saludos,
Oscar
📸 Oscar OLG Photography
```

---

## MSG 2: Follow-up if No Response (Send after 24 hours)

```
Hola [FIRST_NAME],

Solo un recordatorio rápido — todavía hay espacio para 
tu sesión este mes 🎉

Cuando quieras agendar esa llamada:
[CALENDAR_LINK]

¡Gracias!
Oscar
```

---

## MSG 3: Follow-up #2 (Send after 48 hours if still no response)

```
[FIRST_NAME], última vez que te lo ofrezco por ahora 😊

Sesión de $2,500 gratis o con descuento en tu boda.

Si estás interesado:
[CALENDAR_LINK]

Si no, ¡sin problema! Mucho éxito en su boda, y espero 
vernos en el futuro ❤️

Oscar
```

---

## MSG 4: Call Scheduled - Confirmation

```
¡Perfecto! ✨

Te confirmamos tu llamada:

📅 [DATE_FORMATTED] 
⏱️ [TIME] (duración: 15 min)
📱 Te llamo por WhatsApp video

Temas que cubriremos:
✓ Tu historia + visión para las fotos
✓ Fechas de boda + lo que han planeado
✓ Las opciones que tengo (hay 2 opciones muy buenas)
✓ Cualquier pregunta

¡Nos vemos en [TIME]! Y si algo cambia, avísame 👍

Oscar
```

---

```
¡Hola [FIRST_NAME]!

En 30 min nos vemos por video llamada 😊

Te dejo el link por si necesitas:
[ZOOM_OR_WHATSAPP_LINK]

¡Nos vemos en poquito!
Oscar
```

```

Fueron seleccionados para la sesión de compromiso GRATIS.

Aquí están los detalles:

📸 SESIÓN DE COMPROMISO GRATIS
✓ 60 minutos juntos
✓ 10 fotos completamente editadas
✓ Ubicación a su gusto (si la ubicación cobra, ustedes asumen)
✓ Resultado: Fotos hermosas para sus redes + album personal

Ahora elige tu fecha:
[CALENDAR_LINK]

¿Alguna pregunta? Aquí estoy 👍

Oscar
```

## MSG 6B: After Call - Selected for EARLY BIRD Wedding Package + Session

```
¡FELICIDADES! 🎉

Tenemos espacio para ustedes con nuestra opción EARLY BIRD
(que es la que recomendamos):

✨ SESIÓN DE COMPROMISO (Gratis)
  • 60 minutos juntos
  • 10 fotos editadas
  • A la ubicación que quieran

+ 

✨ PAQUETE DE BODA CON DESCUENTO EARLY BIRD
  • 15% descuento en el paquete que elijan
  • Las 10 fotos del compromiso cuentan en la galería de boda
  • Aseguran su fecha de boda con nosotros
  • Descuento válido si reservan en los próximos 30 días

¿Cuál es la mejor opción para ustedes?

Si quieren hablar detalles de paquetes:
[CALENDAR_LINK para consulta de paquetes]

Estamos emocionados de trabajar con ustedes 😊

Oscar
```

## MSG 7: After Session - Post-Shoot Upsell

```
¡Qué fue un gusto! 📸

Las fotos de hoy están editadas y listas.

Las recibirán en la galería privada mañana a las 10am.

🎉 Una cosa rápida:

Muchas parejas después de la sesión me preguntaban: 
"Oscar, ¿cuánto es para reservarte para la boda?"

Si eso era lo que estaban pensando... ¡tengo buenas noticias!

✨ Todavía aplica el 15% de descuento (EARLY BIRD)
✨ Si reservan esta semana, aseguran su fecha
✨ El compromiso cuenta para la galería de boda

¿Hablamos de paquetes? Tengo tiempo mañana 2-3pm ☀️

[CALENDAR_LINK]

Si no, ¡sin prisa! Las fotos son suyas para disfrutar.
Nos vemos 😊

Oscar
```

---

## MSG 8: Long-Term Nurture (Send 2 weeks after session if no wedding booking)

```
Hola [FIRST_NAME],

Espero hayan estado disfrutando sus fotos de compromiso 😊

Algo que pasó estos días: varias parejas me escribieron 
preocupadas de que se les pasara el descuento EARLY BIRD
de la boda 😅

Si eso era lo que ustedes más o menos estaban pensando
— reservar su boda — aquí estoy.

Los precios suben después de [DATE], así que si quieren 
el descuento, ahora es buen momento para platicar.

Pero cero presión. Estoy aquí cuando se decidan ❤️

¿Que tal una llamada corta?
[CALENDAR_LINK]

Oscar
```

---

## MSG 9: 1-Month Follow-Up (if still no wedding booking)

```
[FIRST_NAME], ¡un mes sin noticias tuyas!

¿Cómo va la planeación de la boda? 

Si necesitas fotógrafo, let me know. Si ya consiguieron quién,
¡que sea hermosa la boda! 📸

Pero si cambian de opinión... aquí estoy.

Oscar
```

---

## MSG 10: Seasonal Upsell (if they booked the wedding)

```
¡[FIRST_NAME]! 😊

Falta poco para tu boda 🎉

Algo que a muchas parejas se les olvida: 
¿Necesitan fotos del día de la boda en video? 
Tengo opciones de videografía que van bien con la sesión 
de fotos.

Hablamos?

[CALENDAR_LINK]

Oscar
```

## 📞 CALL SCRIPT - 15 Minutes

### BEFORE YOU CALL
- [ ] Review their form (story, wedding date, engagement level)
- [ ] Check their Instagram to see their vibe
- [ ] Read their full story answer out loud (to remember it)
- [ ] Have this script visible on screen

### THE CALL

---

### **MIN 0:00-0:30 — OPENING**

```
"Hola [NAMES], ¡qué gusto! First of all, congratulations 
on getting engaged. We're really excited that you applied. 
How are you both doing today?"

[Let them respond naturally. Be warm. Show genuine interest.]
```

---

### **MIN 0:30-3:30 — LISTEN & LEARN** (Ask, then SHUT UP and listen)

**"Tell me your story"**
```
"So here's what I'd love to hear — where did you two meet? 
And tell me about the proposal. How did he/she ask you?"

[Listen for: How excited they sound, how detailed they are, 
how genuine the connection seems]

[After they tell the proposal:]
"That's beautiful! I can see why you two are excited. 
Now tell me — what's your timeline for the wedding?"

[Listen for: Wedding date (6-12 months away is ideal), 
urgency level, how far along in planning]

"And have you thought about who'll be photographing your big day?"

[Listen for: Already have someone / comparing options / 
no one yet / just getting started]

IF THEY SAY "Already have someone": 
"No worries at all! Well, the engagement session is still 
a fun way to get some beautiful photos before the wedding. 
What do you think about that?"

IF THEY SAY "Still looking" or "Just decided to apply today":
"Perfect. So we're on your list. I love that."
```

---

### **MIN 3:30-8:30 — THE PITCH**

**Set up the two options clearly:**
```
"So here's what I'm thinking, because I want to make sure 
this makes sense for you three, okay?

I have two different ways we can work together:

OPTION 1 is: Come do a FREE engagement session with me. 
You get 60 full minutes of us working together, getting 
to know each other. You'll get 10 beautiful edited photos 
back. That's a $2,500 value, completely on us. 

What that does is: You get amazing photos of just you two, 
and you get to see if we vibe and if you love how I work. 
No commitment to anything else.

OPTION 2 is: We do the same beautiful 60-minute session, 
BUT if you love it and you want to book me for your wedding... 
those 60 minutes are credited PLUS you get 15% off your 
wedding package pricing. So you're saving money AND you 
get the pre-wedding photos.

The early bird discount is good until [DATE], just so 
you know.

What sounds more interesting to you two?"

[STOP TALKING. Let them respond. Don't over-explain.]
```

---

### **IF THEY CHOOSE OPTION 1 (Free Session Only):**
```
"Perfect! So let's get you on the calendar. 

What dates are you generally more available — 
weekends or during the week? And do you have a favorite 
location in [CITY] where you'd like to shoot?"

[Offer 2-3 date options]

"How does [DATE] at [TIME] sound?"

[If yes] "Perfect. I'll send you all the details on 
what to wear, where to meet, everything on WhatsApp 
in a few minutes. You're all set 😊"

[Note in your system: FREE SESSION option / Follow-up after 
session with wedding package pitch]
```

---

### **IF THEY CHOOSE OPTION 2 (Early Bird Wedding Package):**
```
"Excellent choice. So we lock in your engagement session 
plus your wedding date right now, and you get the early 
bird pricing.

Let me ask you a few things about your wedding vision so 
I can recommend the right package:

1) How many hours are you thinking? [answer]
2) Just the ceremony and reception, or are you doing 
   getting-ready photos too? [answer]
3) Do you want an assistant photographer with you all day? [answer]

Based on that, I'd recommend the [PACKAGE_NAME] package, 
which is [PRICE] with your early bird discount.

Does that feel like the right fit?

If they say YES:
"Perfect! Let's lock this in. I'll send you the 
booking agreement and payment link on WhatsApp. 
First payment secures your date.

For the engagement session, let's pick your dates..."
[Calendar booking]

If they say "I need to think about it" or seem hesitant:
"No worries! Sleep on it. The early bird discount 
expires [DATE], so just let me know before then, okay? 
Happy to answer any questions."
```

---

### **MIN 8:30-9:00 — CLOSE**

**If they booked:**
```
"Awesome! You're all set. I'm going to send you 
everything on WhatsApp in the next 30 minutes.

Before we go — any last-minute questions?"

[Answer any questions]

"Great! Can't wait to photograph your story. This is 
going to be amazing. See you soon!"
```

**If they didn't book:**
```
"Hey, no pressure at all. Think it over, let me know. 
The engagement session is a fun way to get to know each 
other, and the early bird discount does expire on [DATE].

Any questions before we hang up?"

[Answer]

"We'll talk soon 😊 Bye!"
```

---

### **AFTER THE CALL**

- [ ] Send confirmation message (MSG 4 if booked, or follow-up if not)
- [ ] Add to your lead tracking spreadsheet
- [ ] Set calendar reminder: If no session booking by 48hrs, send MSG 2
- [ ] Track: Option chose, conversation tone, likelihood to convert

---

## 📊 LEAD TRACKING SPREADSHEET

**Copy this into your Google Sheets or Excel:**

| Lead Date | First Name | Age Est. | Wedding Date | Photographer Status | Form Story Quality | Urgency Score | Call Date & Time | Option Chosen | Booked? | Session Date | Wedding Budget Estimate | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 4/2 | Carlos | 30 | Sept 2026 | No one yet | Detailed (9/10) | 8 | 4/3 2pm | Free + EBIRD | Yes | 5/10 | High | Very engaged couple |
| | | | | | | | | | | | | |

---

## 🎯 DAILY CHECKLIST (During Campaign)

**Every morning:**
- [ ] Check Meta Ads Manager: CPL, CTR, form completions
- [ ] Check WhatsApp: New leads overnight
- [ ] Send welcome message to any new leads (MSG 1)
- [ ] Schedule calls for leads waiting > 24hrs

**Every afternoon:**
- [ ] Do scheduled discovery calls
- [ ] Send call confirmations/follow-ups (MSG 4 or MSG 2)
- [ ] Update lead tracking spreadsheet
- [ ] Review form responses for quality

**Weekly Friday:**
- [ ] Calculate: Total leads, cost per lead, conversion rate
- [ ] Flag: Which ad creative performed best
- [ ] Plan: Next week's optimizations

---

## 🚀 RESPONSE TIME TARGETS

| Action | Target Time | Impact |
|--------|-------------|--------|
| Welcome message | < 1 hour | 💚 High — shows respect |
| Call scheduling | < 2 hours | 🔥 Critical — 3x higher booking rate |
| Call follow-up | < 30 min after | 💚 High — captures decision while excited |
| Session booking | Within 24hrs | 💚 High — commitment while motivated |
| Post-session upsell | < 24 hrs | 🔥 Critical — wedding offers freshest |

**Pro tip:** Set phone reminders on your calendar for calls. 
Fast follow-up = better conversions.

---

## ✅ APPROVAL FLOWS (Document who approves what)

**Option 1: Free Session — Who needs approval?**
- Your approval only (you're offering)
- They just confirm dates

**Option 2: Early Bird Wedding Package — Who needs approval?**
- They need to confirm
- You need to verify date availability
- You prepare booking agreement

**Never say "Let me check budget/dates" during call:**
- You control this (no hidden approvals needed)
- Shows confidence

---

## CRISIS TEXTS (When things go wrong)

**If they're losing interest:**
```
"No problem at all! I know wedding planning can be overwhelming. 
If at any point you need a photographer or want to chat more, 
I'm here. Mucho éxito en la boda! 🎉"
```

**If they forget about the session:**
```
"Hey! Thought you might have forgotten — your session is 
tomorrow at [TIME] at [LOCATION]. Talk soon!"
```

**If session goes bad (they're upset about photos):**
```
"[NAME], I want to make sure you love your photos. Can we 
jump on a quick call to see what we can fix? I'm committed 
to making this right 👍"
```

---

## 💡 PRO TIPS WHILE CALLING

1. **Show genuine interest** — Ask about THEIR story first
2. **Listen more than you talk** — 60% them, 40% you
3. **Use their names** — Say "Carlos and María" not "you two"
4. **Don't oversell** — Let THEM ask questions
5. **Empathize** — "I remember feeling pressured planning weddings too..."
6. **Build urgency naturally** — "Early bird expires [DATE]" (matter of fact)
7. **Get written confirmation** — "Sound good?" and wait for yes
8. **Set next steps clearly** — "I'll send the link at..." not "I'll follow up"

---

**Print this page or bookmark it.** Reference during calls and follow-ups. 📌
